reasoning: The FRED trend analysis indicates a high probability of short-term increase (P=0.71). Current market forecasts project long-term mortgage rates to decrease from the ~6.5% range towards 5.7%-5.9% by late 2026 as the Fed is expected to cut rates. Although short-term momentum expects an increase initially by late April/May 2026, the long-term trend expects rates to drop. This implies the index will likely be above 6.546 on 2026-04-19, but will fall below that mark by late 2026 and remain below it into 2027. Over the much longer horizon (2029-2036), uncertainty increases significantly, so probabilities revert closer to 0.5.
